name: Mukhbir: The Story of a Spy
original_name: Mukhbir: The Story of a Spy
overview: After the Sino-India war, a highly trained Indian spy enters Pakistan on a mission to gather crucial intelligence and stop Pakistan from launching an attack against India. Will he succeed?

trailers.title: Mukhbir - The Story of a Spy | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Premieres November 11 On ZEE5
